challenges.name: Spring Awakening
challenges.description: March madness for vinyl. Seven days of spring-themed spins.
prompts: An album that sounds like spring
Something you're spinning for the first time this season
A record with green, yellow, or floral artwork
An album that feels like renewal
Something uplifting and fresh
A record you haven't played in months
Your favorite spring memory album

challenges.name: Spindle Spin-In
challenges.description: Get the ball rolling. First week of Spindle beta — show us what's spinning.
prompts: The record that made you want to test Spindle
Your most-played album this month
Something you're spinning right now
A record you'd play to introduce Spindle to a friend
Your guilty pleasure spin
An album that defines your collection
The record you've owned the longest

challenges.name: Collection Stories
challenges.description: Every record has a story. Share yours.
prompts: A record with a story behind the purchase
Something you inherited
A thrift store find you'd never heard of
An album you bought on impulse
A record that came with you on a journey
Something a friend gifted you
The record that started your collection
An album you almost threw away but kept
A record connected to a specific memory
Something you'd play to explain who you are

challenges.name: Spindle Showcase
challenges.description: A celebration of your setup, collection, habits, and listening identity.
prompts: Your listening setup (turntable, speakers, storage, vibes)
An album that represents your taste perfectly
Your most-played record lately
A hidden gem from your collection
A record you own just for the artwork
An album you think deserves more spins
Your current collection in one photo

challenges.name: Discovery Loop
challenges.description: Dig deeper into your collection and uncover records you haven't given enough love.
prompts: A record you forgot you owned
An album you've been meaning to spin
A record you bought recently but haven't played enough
A genre you want to explore more
A record you almost sold but kept
A nostalgic album from another chapter of life
A spin that changed your mood this week
